analysis_summary.dominant_theme: Three primary RF-04 events in the April window; May through early June cooperative. Apr 16 dementia clock contempt (ROW-2334). Apr 22 extreme Abby attack with 'bitch' and 'fucking whore mouth' sexual slurs + legal threat + inadequacy attack (ROW-2373-2379). Apr 28 follow-up Abby exclusion campaign via child relay (ROW-2395-2409). ARC-RF04-002 significantly activated: two new signals as Olivia's distress and preferences about Abby are used as sustained pressure instruments.
analysis_summary.abby_framework_escalation: Abby framework reaches new severity peak. Apr 22: 'bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth' — most extreme sexual-character language used against Abby in record to date. Qualitative arc: predation allegation (B-003) → uncle/niece incest framing (B-004, B-006) → casual 'slut McGee' slur (B-006) → extreme 'fucking whore' attack (B-007). Framework is accelerating and intensifying.
analysis_summary.arc_rf04_002_activation: ARC-RF04-002 receives two new signals in B-007, both structured around Olivia's distress/preferences about Abby. New mechanism: child-relay being used not just for general parenting guilt but as specific Abby exclusion lever — Olivia's stated wishes weaponized to pressure Eli into removing his partner from his home.

primary_flags.trigger: Eli missed calling Olivia at the regular time, explained he lost track of time and acknowledged difficulty with time management.
exact_text: ROW-2330: You've literally had all day
ROW-2331: She didn't cross your mind at all?
ROW-2332 (Eli): She did I just imagined she was out having fun
ROW-2333 (Eli): You know I have trouble keeping track of time.
ROW-2334: Véfaîî Newest,Dementia Clock 2.0 with 15 Custom Reminders and Remote Control, Day Clock with Sun/Moon Icons Helps with Memory Loss, A... [product link]
primary_flags.analysis: Two-mechanism cluster: (1) Guilt delivery via Olivia (ROW-2330-2331) — 'She didn't cross your mind at all?' frames Eli's time-management lapse as evidence of Olivia's irrelevance to him; ARC-RF04-002 overlap (Olivia's importance weaponized as guilt lever). (2) Targeted cognitive contempt (ROW-2334) — after Eli disclosed a genuine difficulty ('You know I have trouble keeping track of time'), Melissa responded by sending a product link for a 'Dementia Clock 2.0' designed for people with dementia/memory loss. This is a weaponized self-disclosure contemptuous attack: Eli's vulnerability is immediately converted into cognitive-impairment mockery. ADD-002 adjacent (capacity/intelligence attack). The dementia product link is more calculated than most ADD-002 triggers — it's targeted at a specific disclosed weakness rather than a reactive insult. Sev 1: brief exchange, but the targeted precision of the dementia product makes this qualitatively notable.
primary_flags.add002_note: Dementia clock product link = capacity contempt. Pattern note: cognitive/capacity attack sub-pattern in ARC-RF04-001 now includes: ROW-334 'Are you stupid?' (B-001), ROW-1167 'Are you dumb?' (B-004), ROW-1731 'Are you dumb?' (B-005), ROW-1738 'lacks ability to read or pay attention' (B-005), ROW-2334 dementia clock (B-007). Increasingly varied and targeted.

primary_flags.trigger: Eli apparently left Olivia alone in the car briefly during a visit; Abby also present. Olivia apparently told Melissa. Melissa claims Abby told Olivia she couldn't have a treat if she told Melissa.
exact_text_key_excerpts: ROW-2372: Don't be leaving Olivia in the car by herself. Cars are getting stolen all the time. It's not safe
ROW-2373: And Abby doesn't need to tell her that she can't have a treat if she tells me what's going on. That bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth
ROW-2374: You both shouldn't be telling her not to tell me stuff. That's shady
ROW-2375: And don't be leaving her in the car with Abby alone either. That's contempt of court
ROW-2376: Don't ever leave olivia in the car by herself or with just Abby. I will file contempt charges
ROW-2377: Don't teach her to lie or keep things from me and check your bitch when she's being mean to Olivia
ROW-2378: She was only with you for three hours. There is no reason she should be left alone. You can't handle three hours a week? Wtf. You are a fuck[ing...]
ROW-2379: Olivia was crying saying Abby was mean to her and wants me to tell you not to bring her around much anymore
primary_flags.analysis: Highest-severity Abby-framework attack in the record to date. Multi-vector attack with five distinct RF-04 mechanisms active: (1) Extreme sexual character slur against Abby: ROW-2373 'bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth' — most severe language directed at Abby in the record. RF-04 (contemptuous attack) and RF-15 (sexual character slur, 'whore'). Escalation from 'slut McGee' (casual banter register, B-006) to direct 'fucking whore' attack (confrontational register, B-007). (2) Deception/coaching accusation: ROW-2374 'telling her not to tell me stuff. That's shady' + ROW-2377 'Don't teach her to lie or keep things from me' — alleges coordinated deception by Eli and Abby. (3) Legal threats: ROW-2375-2376 'contempt of court' and 'I will file contempt charges' — RF-05 (intimidation via legal threat). (4) Inadequacy attack: ROW-2378 'You can't handle three hours a week? Wtf. You are a fuck[ing...]' — 'three hours a week' framing returns (last used Feb 23 'horrible father' cluster), truncated severe contemptuous label. (5) Child-mediated relay: ROW-2379 Olivia crying + Abby exclusion demand relayed via Olivia's distress — ARC-RF04-002 signal 4, and RF-02 (access conditioning: Abby excluded from Eli's time with Olivia). Sev 2: extreme contemptuous language, multiple attack vectors, legal threats, child relay. COMP-RF04-007.
primary_flags.rf15_note: ROW-2373 'fucking whore mouth' = most severe sexual-character attack on Abby in record. Abby-framework trajectory: predation allegation (B-003) → incest framing (B-004, B-006) → 'slut McGee' casual slur (B-006) → 'fucking whore' confrontational attack (B-007). RF-15 anchor event for Phase A mid-period.

primary_flags.trigger: Eli requested to pick up Olivia (Apr 28); Melissa continued pressing Abby exclusion conditions and relaying Olivia's stated preferences about Abby.
exact_text_key_excerpts: ROW-2395: Will you be leaving her in the car by herself?
ROW-2396: She said she doesn't want Abby around
ROW-2398: She said she doesn't want Abby around cause Abby was mean to her last time
ROW-2399: She said that she doesn't want to go if Abby is there
ROW-2401: Olivia was crying after you dropped her off. She said that after she said she was going to tell me that you left her in the car unsupervise[d...]
ROW-2402: You shouldn't have left her in the car unsupervised
ROW-2403: You shouldn't then try to teach her to keep things from me.
ROW-2404: Abby shouldn't punish her by not including her
ROW-2405: You guys are incapable of making good choices
ROW-2406: Instead of trying to argue about it why don't you just listen to your daughters requests.
ROW-2407: She actually told me this morning that she wants me to pick her up from primrose and that you can pick her up from here and if Abby's in the [car...]
ROW-2408: That was her making that plan all on her own.
ROW-2409: She is adamant that she doesn't want to go with you if Abby is with you. She says milo can come
primary_flags.analysis: Continued Abby exclusion pressure campaign via child relay. Two primary RF-04 elements: (1) Contemptuous inadequacy attack: ROW-2405 'You guys are incapable of making good choices' — broad incapacity characterization applied to Eli and Abby together. Mild contempt compared to Apr 22 cluster but ADD-002 adjacent. (2) Persistent deception accusation: ROW-2403 'try to teach her to keep things from me' — carries forward the coaching/deception narrative from Apr 22. ARC-RF04-002 mechanism: ROW-2396-2409 deploys Olivia's stated wishes about Abby as sustained pressure instrument across 14+ messages. ROW-2407-2409 presents Olivia's 'own plan' to avoid Abby — Olivia's apparent agency is being relayed/amplified as absolute authority over Eli's domestic arrangements. This framing positions Eli as overriding his daughter's own clearly expressed wishes if he brings Abby — making compliance with Abby exclusion a child-welfare imperative. RF-02 element: ROW-2406-2409 function as access-conditioning (Olivia won't go unless Abby absent). ARC-RF04-002 signal 5 (sustained Olivia-preference relay about Abby). Sev 1 given the language is less extreme than Apr 22; the mechanism is the sustained child-relay pressure rather than contemptuous language.

exact_text: ROW-2293: We're not playing wait and see
ROW-2294: I'll just pick her up since you are going back on your promise to her
ROW-2295: You want to at least pick her up and take her to lunch then take her back?
peripheral_flags.note: Access threat tied to Eli's schedule conflict (PT appointment discovered late). 'Going back on your promise to her' deploys Olivia as guilt vehicle alongside access threat. Near-boundary RF-04/RF-02. The backing-off at ROW-2295 (offering a shorter visit) softens the overall exchange. Not primary RF-04; note for RF-02 pass.

exact_text: ROW-2460: She's screaming when she pees cause you did something to her vagina when you picked her up
ROW-2463: For clarity she said you hurt it because you picked her up and her outfit went up and gave her a wedgie in the front and she screamed and yo[u set her down]
ROW-2464: She is not saying you touched it or anything
ROW-2468: Still hurting but not screaming when she pees. You need to be more careful with her. She's always getting hurt by you
peripheral_flags.note: ROW-2460 initial framing — 'you did something to her vagina when you picked her up' — is alarming language that could imply sexual contact before ROW-2463-2464 clarify (wedgie/outfit). The immediate clarification reduces deliberate-false-allegation interpretation but the initial framing remains noteworthy. ROW-2468 'She's always getting hurt by you' introduces an unsafe-parent pattern claim. RF-04 element: unsafe-parent inadequacy framing ('always getting hurt'). RF-15 note: initial ambiguous framing consistent with broader Abby-framework and predation narrative pattern; may be relevant context when RF-15 pass runs.

peripheral_flags.exact_text: She's always getting hurt by you
peripheral_flags.note: Unsafe-parent pattern claim — 'always' suggests pattern of Eli causing Olivia physical harm. Parenting-adequacy attack adjacent to ARC-RF04-001's inadequacy-framing sub-pattern. Near-boundary: stated in context of a genuine minor injury and legitimate safety concern. Not primary flag on its own; captured in RF04-B007-P002 note.

exact_text: ROW-2577: Well if you have something weird I don't want you in the pool anyhow
peripheral_flags.note: STD implication when Eli explains he cannot swim due to healing skin. Contemptuous sexual insinuation — immediate assumption of STD as explanation for skin healing. RF-04 (contemptuous insinuation) + RF-15 (sexual character attack, STD implication extending Abby-as-promiscuous framework). Brief exchange, possibly banter-adjacent, but consistent with broader sexual-character-attack pattern in record. Note for RF-15 pass.

peripheral_flags.exact_text: Olivia was crying saying Abby was mean to her and wants me to tell you not to bring her around much anymore
peripheral_flags.note: ARC-RF04-002 signal 4 (child distress + child preference relayed as Abby exclusion demand). This message is primarily captured in RF04-B007-002 primary flag but merits separate arc-signal notation: Olivia's crying and expressed preference are weaponized simultaneously as (1) guilt about Abby's behavior (inadequacy: Eli can't protect Olivia from mean Abby), (2) pressure to exclude Abby from Eli's life. RF-02 element: Olivia's wish framed as visitation condition. New mechanism in ARC-RF04-002: child's preferences used to control Eli's domestic partner access rather than just general parenting critique.

compound_patterns.label: Apr 22 Extreme Abby Attack + Legal Threat + Child Relay
compound_patterns.description: Seventh compound multi-RF episode — highest RF-count compound so far. RF-04 (primary, Sev 2 — extreme contemptuous language, deception accusation, inadequacy 'three hours a week,' truncated severe label) + RF-15 (ROW-2373: 'fucking whore mouth' = most severe sexual character slur against Abby to date; Abby-framework escalation peak) + RF-05 (ROW-2375-2376: contempt-of-court threats, 'I will file contempt charges') + RF-02 (ROW-2376-2379: Abby exclusion conditions on Olivia's visit + child-relay as access-control lever) + RF-01 (ROW-2378: 'can't handle three hours a week?' — inadequate-father narrative). Triggered by Eli leaving Olivia briefly in car and Abby allegedly discouraging Olivia from reporting.

ARC-RF04-001.abby_framework_note: Abby-as-obstacle framework reaches new severity peak. B-007 adds: ROW-2373 'fucking whore mouth' (extreme sexual slur, Sev 2 signal) + ROW-2395-2409 (sustained exclusion campaign via child relay). Framework now spans: prioritization (B-002) → domestic mockery (B-003) → predation allegation (B-003) → uncle/dad framing (B-004) → illness-excuse (B-005) → incest framing x2 (B-006) → 'slut McGee' casual slur (B-006) → 'fucking whore' extreme attack (B-007) → sustained exclusion demand via child (B-007). Multi-register attack: calculated allegations, casual contempt, extreme confrontational attacks.
ARC-RF04-001.cognitive_attack_pattern_note: ROW-2334 dementia clock adds to cognitive-contempt sub-pattern: 'Are you stupid?' (B-001), 'Are you dumb?' x3 (B-004, B-005), 'lacks ability to read/pay attention' (B-005), dementia clock (B-007). Pattern shows increasing sophistication — moves from reactive insults to targeted mockery of disclosed vulnerabilities.

ARC-RF04-002.new_mechanism_note: B-007 introduces new ARC-RF04-002 mechanism: child-relay no longer limited to parenting-adequacy guilt (complaint relay, hunger, emotional distress) — now deployed as Abby exclusion lever. Olivia's distress about Abby and Olivia's stated preferences weaponized to pressure Eli about his domestic partner. Signal 4 (ROW-2379): Olivia's distress + exclusion wish. Signal 5 (ROW-2395-2409): sustained relay of Olivia's preferences as absolute authority over Eli's domestic arrangements.

signals.summary: Olivia was crying saying Abby was mean to her and wants me to tell you not to bring her around much anymore. Child distress + exclusion wish relayed as pressure instrument.
Sustained relay of Olivia's stated preferences about Abby ('she doesn't want Abby around,' 'she's adamant,' 'she says milo can come') as absolute authority framing. 14-message campaign.

cp3_items.description: ROW-2373 (Apr 22) — 'bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth' — Abby-framework reaches new severity peak. Qualitative arc: casual 'slut McGee' (B-006 banter) → confrontational 'fucking whore' (B-007 attack). First extreme sexual slur deployed in confrontational register. ARC-RF04-002 signals 4-5 represent new mechanism: child relay used as Abby exclusion lever rather than general parenting guilt. COMP-RF04-007.

cross_rf_notes.RF-15: ROW-2373 'fucking whore mouth' (Abby) — highest-severity sexual slur in Phase A record to date. ROW-2574-2575 STD implication. ROW-2460 ambiguous 'did something to her vagina' initial framing (clarified by ROW-2464). Three RF-15 cross-references in B-007.
cross_rf_notes.RF-02: ROW-2376/2379 Abby exclusion + contempt threat. ROW-2395-2409 sustained Abby exclusion conditions on visitation. ROW-2293-2294 access threat over schedule conflict. Three RF-02 cross-references in B-007.
cross_rf_notes.RF-05: ROW-2375-2376 contempt-of-court threats. RF-05 intimidation via legal threat.
cross_rf_notes.RF-01: ROW-2378 'can't handle three hours a week' — inadequate-father framing. ROW-2405 'incapable of making good choices.' Two RF-01 contributions in B-007.
cross_rf_notes.RF-09: ROW-2334 dementia clock — cognitive mockery of disclosed vulnerability; reality-distortion adjacent (implies Eli's perception of his own time-management difficulty is being pathologized/weaponized). Minor RF-09 note.
